compiled_state.title: RED: Create tests for emit-commit-workflow-event.sh
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Create tests/scripts/test-emit-commit-workflow-event.sh with tests for the commit workflow timing event wrapper. Tests call emit-commit-workflow-event.sh which does not exist yet — all should FAIL (RED).

Test functions (5):
- test_commit_event_start_emits_valid_jsonl: Call with --phase=start, verify valid JSONL with event_type=commit_workflow, phase=start, timestamp present
- test_commit_event_end_emits_valid_jsonl: Call with --phase=end --success=true, verify JSONL with phase=end, success=true, duration_ms present
- test_commit_event_end_failure: Call with --phase=end --success=false --failure-reason="review failed", verify failure_reason field present
- test_commit_event_start_records_timestamp: Call --phase=start, verify start timestamp is persisted to artifact for duration calc
- test_commit_event_graceful_failure: Stub emit-review-event.sh to fail, call wrapper → returns 0 (best-effort)

## TDD Requirement
RED — emit-commit-workflow-event.sh does not exist.

## Test Approach
Create temp dir with WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR override. Call wrapper with --phase args. Parse JSONL output with python3 json.loads. For duration: call start, wait 1s, call end, assert duration_ms >= 1000.

## Files to Modify
- tests/scripts/test-emit-commit-workflow-event.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file syntactically valid. Verify: bash -n tests/scripts/test-emit-commit-workflow-event.sh
- [ ] 5+ test functions. Verify: grep -c "^test_commit_event" tests/scripts/test-emit-commit-workflow-event.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 5)}'
